title: Thun, Bern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Thun, Bern: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Thun is a city in Bern with a population of 44,000. A picturesque city on Lake Thun at the foot of the Alps, famous for its medieval castle, the Aare riverfront, and as a gateway to the Bernese Oberland.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
